0-18

Ayume Harumi was born to a Japanese father (Kazuki Harumi) and American mother (Jane Doe), who were high school sweethearts. She was born in the Akron, Ohio (LEBRONNNNN/CURRYYYYY). By the time she was about to graduate senior year of high school at age 18, she had chosen to attend USC. Wanting to stay close to her parents, she discussed moving to Los Angeles together with them. They both wanted to accept right away, but they admitted moving would be difficult. They would need to find jobs there to be able to afford rent in such an expensive part of the country.
